title: platnium series
wikitext:
[]: platnium series???             Quote Post by NERV » Mon Jun 20, 2005 2:25 pm Are 'they' going to make the plantium special edition DVD's into a box set ??? I heard they were and then i heard they might not and i NEED to make sure...........

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jun 20, 2005 4:49 pm Pretty much every series is released in a stand-alone format intitially, and later as a complete box set. There's nothing to suggest that ADV wouldn't release a Platinum DVD collection. However, as was stated in ADV's press release, the metallic slip covers are limited to the first run, so the box set might look a bit different than the one we have now. The box that's out now fits the DVDs with slip cases, but without slip cases fits 8, and not too snug I might add. If ADV releases a box set without the slip covers, it might be a slightly different box, or perhaps a folding booklet set with a slip cover, like The Tenchi Muyo! OAV set.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Wed Jun 22, 2005 1:04 am Of course they will rlease a box set , how do you think they make their money after the series is released. They will release a box set, I say there is a 99.99999999999% chance of them releasing one

[]:             Quote Post by anatrok » Wed Jun 22, 2005 3:53 pm I think it might be a thinpack deal like the box set for Rahxephon.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Fri Jun 24, 2005 11:52 pm anatrok wrote: I think it might be a thinpack deal like the box set for Rahxephon.

[]:             Quote Post by rb_182_ » Sat Jun 25, 2005 1:06 am It will probably just be the platinum covers without the metalic slipcases. you know what I mean. the red colored covers of the actually dvd case inside the slipcase, inside a new box. we'll see I guess.

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Sun Jun 26, 2005 5:37 am i think they will be releasing a box set- i've seen it for sale for a start; and i'm in england! you guys should have got it first, but saying that only the first 3 platinums have been released so far and was a dodgy shop.....i'm......just going to.......the shop- for cookies, not ilegal releases. no. not at all. *cough* (i actually did cough then, which is quite worrying)

[]:             Quote Post by rb_182_ » Sun Jun 26, 2005 4:18 pm ice reaper wrote: i think they will be releasing a box set- i've seen it for sale for a start; and i'm in england! you guys should have got it first, but saying that only the first 3 platinums have been released so far and was a dodgy shop.....i'm......just going to.......the shop- for cookies, not ilegal releases. no. not at all. *cough* (i actually did cough then, which is quite worrying)
